title: Translation and Interpretation Services

narrative.executive_view: This packet covers only the frozen translation/localization-led archetype, not all NAICS 541930 firms. Selection uncertainty is true and the controllable-value basis is missing, so no economic conclusion is authored.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target-band accrual recognized-revenue reconciliation identifies gross billings, net revenue, or qualifying third-party pass-through. The required accounting object is supplied, but its amount is deliberately MISSING.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen specification prohibits using the contaminated 5419 occupation proxy and supplies no employee or controllable-contractor cash-cost basis. No roles, weights, removability, or V numerator is invented.
narrative.implementation: No target-archetype evidence establishes five annual operational realization fractions or implementation investment fractions. All r and k primitives remain MISSING rather than being inferred from general AI commentary.
narrative.commercial_capture: No target-sized translation/localization evidence isolates five annual retained-savings shares after repricing, renewal, mix, and competition. Commercial-retention primitives therefore remain MISSING and separate from implementation.
narrative.buyability: The selected-archetype coverage range is retained from the frozen specification. Sale availability, conditional buyer access/win, and both scoped capacity selections lack target-applicable evidence and remain MISSING.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No closed comparable transaction set supports a normalized entry multiple or a digest-bound entry-equivalent downside multiple. The required closed state and exclusion map are present with missing values only.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive fixed-base service basket reconciles to controllable value added for this archetype. The basket is explicitly MISSING; no scalar survival estimate is substituted.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Archetype ranges overlap, the target-band count is estimated, and every score-driving value-basis, realization, commercial, capacity, valuation, and survival primitive is missing. Readiness must remain UNPROVEN.

scenario_narratives.low: No supported downside bundle can be constructed because the required controllable-value, operating, commercial, capacity, valuation, and survival primitives are missing.
scenario_narratives.base: No base scenario is constructed: selection uncertainty is true and the frozen specification supplies no controllable-value basis or score-driving operating evidence.
scenario_narratives.high: No supported upside bundle can be constructed from the available authorities; missing inputs are not converted into favorable endpoints.

sources.title: The 2024 Nimdzi 100
sources.what_it_supports: Language-service provider ranking and stated main-business descriptions used only to preserve the frozen archetype-coverage derivation.

sources.title: 2022 SUSB Annual Data Tables by Establishment Industry
sources.what_it_supports: The frozen specification's target-band context; it does not supply target-archetype cash-cost, transaction, or survival primitives.

n_band.rationale: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $162,427 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541930); class <5: 2,193 firms, avg revenue/firm $268,027 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $41,946 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 223 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,388,377 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $217,281 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 120 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,092,642 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $483,998 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 95 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,796,705 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $907,184 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 28 firms, avg revenue/firm $40,892,000 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,399,598 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 15 firms, avg revenue/firm $211,163,133 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $33,047,030 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 28
caveats: Normalized dataset value lacks MED/HIGH support and is not promoted to DIRECT.

inclusion_criteria: U.S. business classified in NAICS 541930 and estimated to have $1 million to $10 million of EBITDA.

More than 50% of annual language-service revenue is generated by converting or adapting written material, including document translation, localization, terminology, editing, or closely related written-language quality services.
The business may also provide interpreting, but written translation and localization remain the majority revenue model.
exclusion_criteria: Businesses with more than 50% of annual language-service revenue from live spoken-language or sign-language interpreting.
Balanced providers for which neither written translation/localization nor live interpreting exceeds 50% of annual language-service revenue.
Software publishers, media-production or dubbing companies, language schools, individual freelancers, and internal language departments not primarily classified in NAICS 541930.
target_archetype.selection_basis: The 28-firm target-band total is fixed from the normalized dataset. Its 15.65% margin assumption implies a revenue screen of about $6.39 million-$63.90 million. The publicly disclosed 2024 Nimdzi ranking and just-below-ranking cohort contains 14 U.S. or U.S./China providers in that interval: seven described as translation/localization-led (MotionPoint, PGLS, Unbabel, Acclaro, Lilt, Willingjet, and Terra Translations), six described as interpreting-led (Certified Languages International, Linguava Interpreters, Hanna Interpreting Services, Language Link Corp, Translations in Motion, and Interpreters Unlimited Group), and one mixed provider (Akorbi). Scaling 7:6:1 to 28 produces base counts of 14, 12, and 2, so translation-localization-led is selected by the largest base count. The ranking is a non-random, incomplete provider list, includes verified and estimated revenue, and does not prove each firm's NAICS assignment or EBITDA; consequently the supported count ranges overlap and the selection remains uncertain.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-band trailing-twelve-month recognized-revenue reconciliation is available.
caveats: No amount is imputed from broad-NAICS receipts.

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No target-band revenue presentation or pass-through partition is documented.
caveats: The empty partition does not assert that pass-through is zero.

employee_cash_cost.rationale: The frozen specification supplies no valid employee cash-cost component.
caveats: The broad-NAICS labor share is not substituted.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.rationale: No target-band controllable freelance-linguist cash-cost component is documented.
caveats: Freelance purchases are not presumed pass-through.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: Preserves the frozen selected-archetype count-derived coverage and its uncertainty; it is not an observed target count.
caveats: The disclosed provider cohort is incomplete and non-random.

bridge.population: Disclosed language-service providers in the frozen cohort
bridge.geography: United States and United States/China as frozen
bridge.business_model: Translation/localization-led selected archetype, with overlapping interpreting-led alternative

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No defined target-band five-year sale-availability population is evidenced.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No conditional access-and-win share at prevailing price is evidenced.

deal_execution_capacity_5y.rationale: No reference-buyer deal-execution ceiling is evidenced.

integration_onboarding_capacity_5y.rationale: No reference-buyer integration/onboarding ceiling is evidenced.

buy_mult.rationale: No comparable all-in entry EV to normalized EBITDA evidence is available.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No supported entry-equivalent normalized year-five operating state is available.

downside_exit_mult.rationale: Downside multiple state or allowed-channel evidence is unsupported.

cva_reconciliation.controllable_value_added_boundary: For this archetype, controllable value added would equal recognized customer revenue less only empirically documented third-party amounts that are contractually passed through to the customer, separately invoiced or otherwise demonstrably agent-like, and outside the operator's control. Freelance linguist and interpreter purchases are not presumed pass-through: they remain controllable contractor cash cost unless target-specific principal-versus-agent and cost-control evidence proves otherwise. Because no target-band reconciliation identifies qualifying pass-through amounts, R_cva and its employee/controllable-contractor cash-cost components are MISSING.

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No target-band revenue presentation or pass-through partition is documented.
caveats: The empty partition does not assert that pass-through is zero.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet is limited to the frozen translation/localization-led archetype and retains its selection uncertainty.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through item is authored; the required gross presentation carries two empty, disjoint partitions and no zero claim.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: No role removability is supplied, and no implementation, commercial, or survival quantity is used as a removability substitute.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is missing and is not placed in commercial retention, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is missing and is kept distinct from operating realization and constant-price demand survival.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Sale availability, access/win, capacity, and entry multiple are separately missing; no price concession is embedded in access.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The closed entry-equivalence fields and digest-bound anchor basis are present; the absent state digest prevents a P conclusion.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The complete exclusion map removes commercial retention and survival, along with every other prohibited multiple channel.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket retains the required fixed-base, constant-quality, CVA-boundary assertions and does not substitute a scalar.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Controllable value-added revenue and cash-cost components
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents V, I normalization, h, and survival-basket reconciliation.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Operational realization, implementation investment, and commercial retention
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents I, C, and h computation.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Sale, access/win, and both buyer capacities

reviewer_note: Validate this as an outcome-neutral missing-evidence packet. Do not infer zero pass-through, zero cost, zero savings, or a negative economic conclusion from the deliberately missing primitives.
